title: Top General Knowledge Topics for UPSC NDA & CDS Written Exams
author: DefenceRoger Editorial
data: General Knowledge is a high-scoring yet vast section in NDA GAT and CDS General Knowledge papers. Analyzing past papers reveals core repeating themes: Indian Polity (Preamble, Fundamental Rights, President), Physical Geography (atmospheres, winds, landforms), Modern History (1857 revolt, freedom struggle), and Physics/Chemistry fundamentals. Additionally, defence exercises, awards, and major global news from the past six months make up a major portion of Current Affairs.
